headline: Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy Exited Autodesk (ADSK) in Q4
summary: Brown Advisory, an investment management company, released its “Brown Advisory Mid-Cap Growth Strategy” fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The Strategy lagged the Russell Midcap® Growth Index in the fourth quarter due to stock selection. The performance was in line with expectations for the full year. The firm believes […]

headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Swings And SaaS Growth Expectations
summary: Autodesk overview and recent performance snapshot Autodesk (ADSK) has drawn investor attention after recent price moves, with the shares closing at US$247.44. The stock shows mixed returns across different periods, including a one-month gain alongside a decline over the past three months. See our latest analysis for Autodesk.
